chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2446 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing on Misc. No.11781/2023. 2. For hearing of main case. 24-03-2025 Mr. Naeem Suleman, Advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Abida Bukhari, Advocate for Respondent No.2. It is jointly stated that this petition is squarely covered by the Division Bench judgment of this Court in the case of Bilquees Khalid and another vs. Federation of Pakistan and another reported as 2022 CLC 2002, therefore, in reliance upon the ratio therein may be disposed of upon the same terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
